title: McCarthy Tétrault Strengthens its International Disputes Expertise with New Partner Vasuda Sinha
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault Strengthens its International Disputes Expertise with New Partner Vasuda Sinha
We are excited to welcome Vasuda Sinha as a partner in our National Litigation and Dispute Resolution Group, reinforcing the firm’s expertise in international commercial, trade and investment disputes.
Vasuda’s decade of experience working in international arbitration with a large international law firm in its Paris office and her five years with an international firm in Toronto have allowed her to develop expertise in cross-jurisdictional disputes. Her arrival in our platform strengthens the firm’s existing international dispute resolution talent, particularly necessary during this time of geopolitical and market volatility.
“We’re very excited to have Vasuda join the firm’s already stellar litigation, arbitration and trade team,” said Thomas Sutton , National Litigation and Dispute Resolution Group Leader. “Vasuda’s expertise and well-earned reputation before Canadian and international dispute resolution tribunals will be particularly important to our clients managing and protecting their international investments including, in particular, in the energy, infrastructure and construction sectors.”
Vasuda has appeared before several international arbitral tribunals, including SCC, ICC, UNCITRAL and ICSID tribunals and Canadian courts, including the Supreme Court of Canada, representing clients from a variety of sectors on high-stakes matters related to commercial disputes and investment treaty violations.
“I’m delighted to be joining McCarthy Tétrault’s top-tier Litigation and Dispute Resolution Group. With their strong stable of clients that have material international investments to grow and protect, I’m looking forward to bringing the knowledge and experience I have developed in Paris back to Canada and the firm where I started my legal career in 2007,” said Vasuda.
McCarthy Tétrault's Litigation and Dispute Resolution Group focuses on addressing our client’s business priorities with clarity and objectivity. We focus on resolving matters effectively but pushing them toward resolution by avoiding unnecessary procedural disputes, focusing on the substantive issues in the disputes and leveraging our reputation as leading trial and hearing counsel. Major businesses trust McCarthy Tétrault for complex disputes in Canada and internationally. With offices across Canada, we have the resources to manage intricate and multijurisdictional disputes in both official languages. Learn how our team can help you .

### About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The Firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the Firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact: media@mccarthy.ca
- Vasuda Sinha Partner | Co-Lead, International Arbitration Group People.Offices.Singular Toronto
